shelfmark: Bodl. MS heb. c 50/16 + Bodl. MS heb. c 50/17
description: Booklet of four pages, listing contributions in dinars or fractions of a dinar. About seventy-two numbers preserved. The list is headed by the Nagid, who pledges 3 dinars, while the others give 2, 1, 1/2, 1/4, 1/8, 1/12, 1/24 dinars, respectively. A number of the persons listed are known as having lived around 1100; consequently, the Nagid referred to was Mevorakh b. Saadya (d. 1111). (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 502, App. C 115, first supplement. See also Goitein notes and index card linked below.)
description_he: חוברת ארבעה עמודים עם רשימת תרומות בדינרים; כ-72 מספרים; ראש הרשימה הנגיד (3 דינרים); מוסבת כנראה על מבורך בן סעדיה (נפ' 1111)
